scenario.name: UAS CANCEL TEST
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 180 Ringing Via: [last_Via:] From: [last_From:] To: [last_To:];tag=uas123 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [last_Via:] From: [last_From:] To: [last_To:];tag=uas123 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 CANCEL Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 487 Request Terminated Via: [last_Via:] From: [last_From:] To: [last_To:];tag=uas123 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Content-Length: 0
